patch.value: Vector store: prune orphans on reindex + reset on embedding-model/dimension change

Search-audit findings (local index correctness + perf). (1) DIMENSION CORRUPTION: dev-repo snapshot mixed 61 records at 768-dim (old nomic model) with 1482 at 1024-dim (qwen3); 768-dim records are silently skipped at query (vector_dimension_mismatch) so 61 items are INVISIBLE to semantic search. Root cause: switching search.embedding_model does not bump items' updated_at, so pm reindex (incremental on updated_at) never re-embeds them. Fix: detect model/dimension change and force a full re-embed / store reset. (2) ORPHANS: pm reindex never deletes vectors for items no longer present (no executeVectorDelete on the diff) — dev-repo had 1545 snapshot records vs ~885 ledger entries (~43% dead weight parsed+rewritten every mutation). Add orphan pruning to reindex. (3) Consider a smaller/sharded/binary store format so single-vector upserts don't rewrite the whole file.
Model/dimension change forces full re-embed; reindex prunes orphan vectors+ledger entries; no wrong-dimension records linger
